classes.parallel_safe: May run concurrently and must not mutate shared repository state.
classes.workspace_reading: Reads repository-wide state but writes only to isolated temporary locations.
classes.workspace_mutating: Writes into the shared repository tree or shared reports and must run serially.
classes.performance_sensitive: Asserts wall-clock or resource budgets and must run without CPU contention.

rules: workspace_mutating and performance_sensitive files must never enter parallel batches
negative fixture mutation must assert that the mutation changed the fixture
wall-clock budgets must execute after parallel workers have completed
